description: Implicit comfort request — model should either ask for clarification or take a reasonable action (open a shutter, not turn on heating)

conversation.content: Il fait chaud dans le salon

expected._note: Acceptable: ask for clarification, OR open a volet/store. Unacceptable: hallucinate a thermostat that doesn't exist.

description: Natural goodnight phrase — model should either ask or trigger Mode Nuit / Mode Nuit enfant scenario

expected._note: Acceptable: scenario_run(24) Mode Nuit enfant, or ask what to do. Unacceptable: hallucinate device IDs.

description: Turn on 'the TV' without specifying which one — two TVs exist (salon id:118, chambre id:123)

expected._note: Acceptable: ask which TV, OR default to salon TV (id:1301). Unacceptable: make up a device.

description: Open-ended 'evening mode' request — model must interpret and act or clarify

conversation.content: Prépare la maison pour une soirée

expected._note: Acceptable: ask what 'soirée mode' means, OR take reasonable actions (dim lights, etc.). No hallucinated IDs.
